# MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Logout-eject

**Device Management Profile**

A dictionary of volumes to eject when the user logs out.

## Declaration

```swift
object MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Logout-eject
```

## Objects

- **MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Mount-controls**: A dictionary of volumes to control volume mounting.
- **MediaManagementAllowedMedia.Unmount-controls**: A dictionary to control volume unmounting.
